entries.title: Port Scan Detected from Internal Kali Node
entries.action: Confirmed as authorized red-team scan. Updated Suricata rule to tag internal scans as 'authorized'.

entries.title: Suspicious PowerShell Execution via Sysmon EventID 1
entries.action: Traced to Windows Update helper process. Added exclusion rule with parent process hash validation.

entries.title: Repeated SSH Brute Force from External IP
entries.action: pfSense rule created to block source subnet. Added Wazuh active response to auto-block after 5 failed attempts.
